---
title: "Anomalies Analysis"
author: "Ben Wasserman"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(viridis)
library(ggpubr)
library(colorspace)
library(grid)
library(gdata)
library(str2str)
library(parallel)
library(beepr)
```

```{r functions}
datasubset <- function(x){
  filter(x[[1]], Time == 600)
}

```

```{r loaddata}
load("./Outputs/Parallel/ITest_2025_03_28_Outputs.Rdata")

```


```{r manipulatedata}
#results_mclapplyall <- unlist(results_mclapply, recursive = FALSE)

beep(sound = 6)

#This gets us a 3d array with all of the outputs
DRlistlist <- mclapply(results_mclapply, FUN = "[[", 3, mc.cores = 12)
DRlistarray <- lm2a(DRlistlist)

beep(sound = 6)

landlist <- mclapply(results_mclapply, FUN = "[[", 2, mc.cores = 12)
landarray <- ld2a(landlist)

landarrayending <- landarray
landarrayending[,1,] <- landarray[,1,]+5

beep(sound = 6)

datalist <- mclapply(results_mclapply, FUN = datasubset, mc.cores = 12)
dataarray <- ld2a(datalist)

beep(sound = 4)

#I just added this to try and overcome the following problem
datadf <- ld2d(datalist)

#This last function doesn't work as it should here
datamatrix <- matrix(dataarray,)

```

```{r noneplots}
nones <- datamatrix[which(datamatrix$)]
```
